query:
ALTER TABLE lessons 
MODIFY COLUMN timezone VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'UTC',
MODIFY COLUMN topic VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
MODIFY COLUMN notes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
MODIFY COLUMN meetingUrl VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL;
